# Review code of JovianDSS Proxmox Plugin

Check documentation in docs folder

Check if changes in current branch are coherent and do not break things.

Review code to be coherent.

There are 2 parts of software:

Put additional effort in making sure that perl part is correct.
Perl part contain majority of bugs and should be treated with extended care.

perl plugin

    ./OpenEJovianDSSPlugin.pm
    ./Op... [truncated, 647 chars total]

primary pass complete; highest risk: Python alarm handler args type bug (bin/jdssc:413) + iSCSI REST lock entirely commented out; task_id=task-1782057089-151c task_key=review:step-01:primary analysis_task_id=task-1782057095-b969 analysis_task_key=review:step-02:iscsi-lock step=2 area=python-iscsi-lock-architecture

alarm handler: TypeError on args['timeout'] before vars(args) conversion breaks Perl retry (Common.pm:948 /jdssc process timed out/ won't match); fix: capture _timeout_val=args.timeout before signal.signal(). iSCSI lock: 8 REST sites commented out; Perl cluster lock (global pmxcfs) provides full exclusion if all ops go through joviandss_cmd — but dead lock.py module needs either re-enable or full removal + doc. primary_task_id=task-1782057089-151c primary_task_key=review:step-01:primary analysis_task_id=task-1782057095-b969 analysis_task_key=review:step-02:iscsi-lock

2 critical issues found and documented: (1) args['timeout'] TypeError in _alarm_handler — fix: capture _timeout_val=args.timeout before signal.signal(); (2) iSCSI lock.py/rest._lock() dead code — either re-enable 8 commented sites or remove lock.py + document Perl cluster lock exclusion. Deep analysis complete. See .eval-sandbox/review/findings.md.
